## [Script] P2 Forsaken Fixed Partners
Script to resolve Forsaken ONLY for strategies that rely always on your fixed partner pair (now with optionally supported south adjust, must enable it in settings). Usually used by NA and EU.

> [!Warning]
>
> It is recommended to also have Forsaken Visualizer script enabled and general presets for phase 2 imported so you can always micro-adjust for someone else.

```
https://github.com/PunishXIV/Splatoon/raw/refs/heads/main/SplatoonScripts/Duties/Dawntrail/Dancing%20Mad/P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner.cs
```

### Per-role configurations for Kroxy/Rinon NEW POSITIONS with fan baiter on the waymark corner
```
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"R1 - Kroxy/Rinon - NEW positions, baiter on waymark corner","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"R2 - Kroxy/Rinon - NEW positions, baiter on waymark corner","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"M1 - Kroxy/Rinon - NEW positions, baiter on waymark corner","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"M2 - Kroxy/Rinon - NEW positions, baiter on waymark corner","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"T1 - Kroxy/Rinon - NEW positions, baiter on waymark corner","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"T2 - Kroxy/Rinon - NEW positions, baiter on waymark corner","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"H1 - Kroxy/Rinon - NEW positions, baiter on waymark corner","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"H2 - Kroxy/Rinon - NEW positions, baiter on waymark corner","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
```

### Per-role configurations for NEW, updated MEOW strat with zenith markers at 2026-06-10 04:04:12 UTC
```
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"NEW POSITIONS Meow / R2","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}

{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"NEW POSITIONS Meow / H2","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}

```

<details>
    <summary>Old configurations for meow/rinon here (originals)</summary>


### Per-role configurations for Kroxy/Rinon (no south swap) - OLD positions, 90 degrees bait

Import this in script's configuration on "Saved configurations" tab.

```
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"R1 - Kroxy/Rinon - OLD positions, 90 degrees bait","Configuration":"","Overrides":null}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"R2 - Kroxy/Rinon - OLD positions, 90 degrees bait","Configuration":"","Overrides":null}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"M1 - Kroxy/Rinon - OLD positions, 90 degrees bait","Configuration":"","Overrides":null}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"M2 - Kroxy/Rinon - OLD positions, 90 degrees bait","Configuration":"","Overrides":null}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"T1 - Kroxy/Rinon - OLD positions, 90 degrees bait","Configuration":"","Overrides":null}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"T2 - Kroxy/Rinon - OLD positions, 90 degrees bait","Configuration":"","Overrides":null}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"H1 - Kroxy/Rinon - OLD positions, 90 degrees bait","Configuration":"","Overrides":null}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"H2 - Kroxy/Rinon - OLD positions, 90 degrees bait","Configuration":"","Overrides":null}
```

### Per-role configurations for Meow strat OLD POSITIONS

Import this in script's configuration on "Saved configurations" tab.

```
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"Meow OLD / MT","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"Meow OLD / OT","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"Meow OLD / H1","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}

{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"Meow OLD / M2","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
{"TargetScriptName":"SplatoonScriptsOfficial.Duties.Dawntrail.Dancing_Mad@P2_Forsaken_Fixed_Partner","ConfigurationName":"Meow OLD / R1","Configuration":"","Overrides":""}
```
